title: StructuralReviewInput
description: Structured input for dk structural review. Grades nine sub-dimensions across three groups: Structure, Complexity, Expressiveness.

working_dir.description: Absolute or relative path to the repository or tree under review. Agent cwd for filesystem access.

target.description: Optional path or glob root within working_dir to focus the review. When omitted, dk uses file discovery defaults.

change_context.description: Metadata about the change under review (PR, CL, or local diff).

title.description: PR/CL title or short summary line.

description.description: Full PR/CL body; should explain what and why.

base_ref.description: Git ref for comparison base, e.g. main or HEAD~1.

head_ref.description: Git ref for the change, e.g. HEAD or branch name.

diff_stat.description: Optional precomputed diff stat summary from dk (files changed, insertions/deletions).

project_hints.description: Pointers the agent should consult under working_dir.

style_guide.description: URL or repo-relative path to the style guide.

contributing.description: Repo-relative path to CONTRIBUTING or review guidelines.

architecture_docs.description: Repo-relative paths to architecture or ADR docs.

max_findings.description: Maximum actionable findings to emit. Prioritize critical and high.

include_dimensions.description: When set, grade only these sub-dimensions (others reported as not_evaluated in output).
